text.message: Black doesn’t even have wood does he haha
you are a trouble maker red
But it’s not like I’m thriving
I’m on 2 resources no ports haha
Yeah you’ll need 31 to do well
Black should not have plowed me
I’d be more hurt by the 10 anyway
Yeah and I didn’t Rob u
There’s a pretty clear distinction here
is not nice to lie like that red
If I had the mono I would mono the wheat rn
And it would be the smart move
Blue I swear on my life It’s a vp
Black do you have something against me
you have 5 points over the board
it is a free card for you
But I’m the Rob so Rob me. Don’t ask for nb
Thought u had wood didn’t see u had 1
Unless oj uses a dev. We are tied.
Black you should keep popping for army
Oj will be tough to beat
Black use a knight if you have
Guys I need to take road or oj double plays
I don’t have the mono black
Black. It is IMPERATIVE that you race army
If you don’t we will effectively lose
That road build was purposeful. You are at 5 settles so it was clearly not to settle
Now. I want you guys to start to realize that I have 2 resources
Realise you’re on 8 w open settle
I think oj may win on his turn
ok i ll do it again fine
My turn passed I didn’t win :[
I honestly thought you would take road
You have all the good devs
But you should probably have spread the love
Though I get that you’re spiteful given your username
I’m glad you sent that into the chat
Because now I have grounds to report
All of my pestering has been above belt
if it’s a VP you win
And if you win…given all that complaining…I’d be pretty embarrassed
I’m complaining about your pestering being annoying
If I had Vp I would’ve won I do not
I have basically no chance of winning lol
Ye u n I fed black
U fed him devs and nbs
In fact, I fed black so little that he got mad and went on a soloing rampage
At one point oj, you had army and road semi locked
But that doesn’t mean you weren’t a threat
That’s made clear by the piss poor rating
good for you tho. You won.
